subcodes.first_line: O thou old friend! A month ago a letter was written to the favored maidservant... The Covenant of God is like unto a vast and fathomless ocean.
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز هر عاقل هوشیاری و عاقبت‌بینی بیدار شود و واقف اسرار مستقبل گردد که جز قوّهٴ میثاق قلب آفاقرا بحرکت نیارد
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
